title: Getting Started
text: Welcome This page is a template and a quick styling playground for markdown content. 1\. Text styles Regular paragraph text. Use bold, italic and inline code when needed. Link example: Open homepage or COSMOS Landing. 2\. Lists Unordered list: First item Second item Third item Ordered list: Step one Step two Step three 3\. Quote This is a blockquote example. Use it for notes and highlights. 4\. Code blocks Terminal commands: TypeScript example: 5\. Heading level 3 Nested section Use this area for additional details and implementation notes. Heading with a custom anchor {#custom-anchor} Use {#custom-anchor} at the end of a heading to set the anchor ID manually. Example link to this section: Jump to custom anchor 6\. Images Example image: Mock image Fig. 1. Mock example. Gallery: \[\[gallery columns=3 gap=12]] Mock image Mock image Mock image \[\[/gallery]] Carousel: \[\[gallery gap=12 layout=carousel]] Mock image Mock image Mock image \[\[/gallery]] 7\. Handmade checklist \[ ] Draft \[ ] Review \[x] Published When finished, mark the task as done. 8\. Tables | Plan | Price | Notes | | --- | ---: | --- | | Starter | $9 | Drafts and quick notes | | Team | $29 | Collaboration space | | Enterprise | Custom | Dedicated support | 9\. Info Blocks \[\[info note]] This is a basic note. \[\[/info]] \[\[info tip]] This is a tip. \[\[/info]] \[\[info warning hasIcon]] This is a warning. \[\[/info]] \[\[info type=custom hasIcon icon=lambda color=#FE89ED]] Custom block with icon and color. \[\[/info]]
description: Demo page with core markdown blocks
